# ReplyAI

> AI-powered email reply generator and meeting notes tool for Nigerian businesses and professionals.

ReplyAI generates 3 professional email reply drafts in seconds from any email you paste in. It also turns meeting notes into structured summaries with action items and priorities.

## Core features

- **Email replies**: Paste any email, pick a tone (Professional, Friendly, Firm, Apologetic, Custom), get 3 reply options instantly
- **Meeting notes**: Paste raw notes → structured summary + action items with owners and deadlines
- **Languages**: English, Nigerian Pidgin, Yoruba, Hausa, French
- **Tones**: 5 tone options per generation
- **History**: Save and revisit all past replies
- **Templates**: Save frequent reply templates
- **Chrome extension**: Reply directly from Gmail and any web inbox

## Pricing

Free tier: 5 reply credits/month. Paid packs from NGN 1,500 (~$1 USD) for 30 credits.

## Built for

Nigerian business owners, freelancers, customer service teams, and anyone who writes professional emails. Particularly useful for teams that communicate in Nigerian Pidgin or local languages alongside English.
